products.name: Premium Health & Beauty Essential Kit
products.description: Our #1 revenue-generating product in the Health & Beauty category — the highest-grossing individual product across the entire catalog with R$ 63,560 in total sales. Purchased by 194 verified buyers with an average rating of 4.2/5.0 (81% positive reviews). Priced at R$ 327.63, it sits at the premium tier of the category — a choice for customers who prioritize quality in their personal care routine.
highlights: #1 best-seller by revenue in Health & Beauty (R$ 63,560 total)

products.name: Signature Watch & Gift Collection Piece
products.description: The top-selling product in our Watches & Gifts collection — the #2 revenue category on the platform. With 321 units sold and R$ 37,455 in total revenue, this piece has become the go-to choice for customers seeking gifts and accessories. Rated 4.2/5.0 across 300 reviews (82% positive). At an average price of R$ 116.68, it offers strong perceived value in the gifting segment — accessible enough for a wide audience while maintaining the premium feel customers expect.
highlights: Top-selling product in Watches & Gifts (R$ 37,455 revenue)
321 units sold — highest volume in the category
Average price R$ 116.68 — strong value in the gift segment

products.name: Luxury Bed & Bath Textile Set
products.description: The volume champion of our #1 category by units sold — Bed, Bath & Table. With 477 units sold, this product leads the largest category in the catalog by a significant margin. It has generated R$ 42,050 in revenue with an average rating of 4.0/5.0 across 430 reviews. At R$ 88.15 average price, it represents our most accessible entry point among the top sellers — ideal for first-time buyers and customers seeking quality home essentials at a practical price.
highlights: #1 by volume in the largest product category (477 units sold)
Most accessible top seller at R$ 88.15 average price
